ddls:
CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin" TEXT /* URL of the web origin */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of access requested by the origin (e.g., storageAccessAPI, offline-app) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the origin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the origin */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the origin (e.g., active, inactive, pending review) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the origin for administrative purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated origin */,
  "permission" INTEGER /* Permission level (e.g., 1 for allowed, 0 for denied) */,
  "expireType" INTEGER /* Type of expiration (e.g., 0 for no expiration, 1 for temporary, 2 for permanent) */,
  "expireTime" TEXT /* Expiration timestamp in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "modificationTime" TEXT /* Last modification timestamp in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the administrator who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the administrator who last updated the permission */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin making the access request */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access request in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access request (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code of the access request */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Detailed message from the access request */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access request */,
  "request_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiration_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expiration type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expiration type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the expiration type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the expiration type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default expiration type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modification_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification record */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission being modified */,
  "modification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the modification in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modification made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the administrator who made the modification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the administrator who last updated the modification */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modification_history_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("id")
)
